mapper.sql: id, flash_chat_num, flash_chat_num_img, mobile, nickname, real_name, sex, face, email, birthday, country, province, city, district, chat_bg, friend_circle_bg, signature, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: insert into flash_chat.users (id, flash_chat_num, flash_chat_num_img, mobile, nickname, real_name, sex, face, email, birthday, country, province, city, district, chat_bg, friend_circle_bg, signature, created_time, updated_time ) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flashChatNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flashChatNumImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{face,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chatBg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{friendCircleBg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into flash_chat.users
id,
flash_chat_num,
flash_chat_num_img,
mobile,
nickname,
real_name,
sex,
face,
email,
birthday,
country,
province,
city,
district,

friend_circle_bg,
signature,
created_time,

mapper.update:
update flash_chat.users
flash_chat_num = #{flashChatNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
flash_chat_num_img = #{flashChatNumImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
face = #{face,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE},
country = #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
chat_bg = #{chatBg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
friend_circle_bg = #{friendCircleBg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
signature = #{signature,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update flash_chat.users set flash_chat_num = #{flashChatNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, flash_chat_num_img = #{flashChatNumImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, face = #{face,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, country = #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, chat_bg = #{chatBg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, friend_circle_bg = #{friendCircleBg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, signature = #{signature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from flash_chat.users where nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or mobile like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') limit 20
